description: Composition Black shorts made of 100% polyester Dri-Fit fabric, has an elasticated waist with a drawcord, white panels on the side seams, attached inner brief and brand logo on the left leg Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, these nike running shorts come in a body-friendly design. These high-performance shorts feature Dri-Fit technology that wicks sweat away from the skin and keeps you dry and comfortable. Team it with t-shirts and track jackets.
